description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:latest Docker image. Define a before_script that runs apt-get update, installs software-properties-common, adds the ansible PPA, updates again, installs python-pip and ansible, installs the dopy Python package version 0.3.5 via pip, and writes the PUBLIC_KEY and PRIVATE_KEY variables to id_rsa.pub and id_rsa files. Add a single deploy stage with a deploy_development job that runs in the deploy stage, sets the environment name to development with URL https://abuango.me, is limited to the master branch, and executes the command ansible-playbook do-ha.yml -c paramiko -e "do_api_token=${DO_TOKEN}" --private-key=id_rsa. Define empty CI variables DO_TOKEN, PRIVATE_KEY, and PUBLIC_KEY.
